overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian Medjay attire walking through a vast desert landscape. The character follows wagon tracks through golden sand, passing small desert dwellings and palm tree oases with rocky cliff formations visible in the distance under a bright partly cloudy sky.

events.description: small desert hut passes out of view behind the character

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wagon tracks away from the small desert dwelling, heading toward the open desert

entered.detail: small wooden and fabric dwelling with a flagpole on the roof
layered sandstone cliff formation running along the right side of the path
tire or wagon wheel tracks embedded in the sand forming a path
cluster of palm trees visible in the distant desert haze

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking along a sandy desert trail marked by wagon tracks, leaving behind a small wooden hut. The landscape features layered rock cliffs on the right and distant palm trees ahead, with bright sunlight casting sharp shadows across the golden sand.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert oasis with palm trees and ruins

events.description: approaching the palm tree cluster with visible stone ruins
passing the small desert camp and palm tree grove on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the desert path, passing the palm tree oasis and stone ruins on the left side

entered.detail: group of tall palm trees providing shade over the desert camp
ancient stone wall remnants and broken structures near the palm trees

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a small desert oasis featuring a cluster of palm trees and ancient stone ruins on the left. The rock cliffs on the right draw closer as the wagon tracks continue through the sandy terrain, with the sun creating a warm glow over the landscape.

events.description: exiting the palm tree area into open desert with large rock wall ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through open sand dunes toward the large rock cliff formation visible ahead

entered.detail: massive layered sandstone cliff face blocking the path ahead

segments.scene_description: Moving beyond the oasis, the character traverses open sand dunes with the palm trees now behind. The path leads toward an imposing large rock wall ahead while the cliff formation on the right grows larger and more detailed. The wagon tracks continue through the pristine desert sand under the partly cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a golden desert landscape that transitions from a small settlement into a vast expanse of dunes and towering rock formations. It begins with the character walking along a sandy trail marked by wagon tracks, leaving a small wooden hut behind as layered cliffs rise to the right. As the character progresses, the scene opens up to a desert oasis where the camera passes a cluster of palm trees and ancient stone ruins under a warm, glowing sun. The path then shifts away from the greenery and into open sand dunes, with the palm trees receding into the distance. Finally, the camera moves toward an imposing rock wall ahead while the cliff formations on the right grow larger and more detailed under a partly cloudy sky.
